mapper.sql: TCB.COUNSEL_SEQ, TCB.COUNSEL_SEQ AS counselSeq, TCB.COUNSEL_CTG, TCB.COUNSEL_NM, TCB.MOBILE_NO, TCB.CRET_ID, TCB.AMD_ID, TCB.CRET_DT, TCB.AMD_DT, TCB.REGION_CD, TCB.AGE_CD, TCB.GENDER_CD, TCB.LAST_COUNSEL_DTL_SEQ
TCD.COUNSEL_DTL_SEQ, TCD.COUNSEL_SEQ, TCD.REPLY_CONTENT, TCD.REPLY_STAT_CD, TCD.DEL_YN, TCD.CRET_ID, TCD.AMD_ID, TCD.CRET_DT, TCD.AMD_DT
mapper.insert:
SELECT SQ_TEL_COUNSEL_BAS_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
/** TelCounsel_Query.insertTelCounselBas 전화상담정보를 저장처리 */ insert into NMCP_TEL_COUNSEL_BAS TCB ( TCB.COUNSEL_SEQ, TCB.COUNSEL_CTG, TCB.COUNSEL_NM, TCB.MOBILE_NO, TCB.CRET_ID, TCB.AMD_ID, TCB.CRET_DT, TCB.AMD_DT, TCB.REGION_CD, TCB.AGE_CD, TCB.GENDER_CD ) values ( #{counselSeq}, #{counselCtg}, #{counselNm}, #{mobileNo}, #{cretId}, null, sysdate, null, #{regionCd}, #{ageCd}, #{genderCd} )
mapper.select: /** TelCounsel_Query.selectTelCounselDtlList 전화상담 기본정보상세 리스트 조회 */ select , (select admin_nm from nmcp_admin_member_bas b where b.admin_id = tcd.cret_id) as cretNm from NMCP_TEL_COUNSEL_DTL TCD where COUNSEL_SEQ = #{counselSeq} and DEL_YN = 'N' order by CRET_DT desc
mapper.update: update NMCP_TEL_COUNSEL_BAS set LAST_COUNSEL_DTL_SEQ = (select COUNSEL_DTL_SEQ from ( select COUNSEL_DTL_SEQ from NMCP_TEL_COUNSEL_DTL where COUNSEL_SEQ = #{counselSeq} and DEL_YN = 'N' order by CRET_DT desc ) where ROWNUM = 1) where COUNSEL_SEQ = #{counselSeq}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SQ_TEL_COUNSEL_BAS_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
/** TelCounsel_Query.insertCtiTelCounsel */ INSERT INTO NMCP_TEL_COUNSEL_BAS ( COUNSEL_SEQ , COUNSEL_CTG , COUNSEL_NM , MOBILE_NO , CRET_DT , AMD_DT , REGION_CD , AGE_CD , GENDER_CD , LAST_COUNSEL_DTL_SEQ , RATE_NM , OPER_TYPE , REQ_USIM_SN , MOVE_MOBILE_NO , JURIDICAL_NUMBER , AGENT_NM ) VALUES ( #{counselSeq}, #{counselCtg}, #{counselNm}, #{mobileNo}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, '', '', '', '', '', '', '', '', #{juridicalNumber}, #{agentNm} )
mapper.select: /** TelCounsel_Query.selectCtiReqCnt */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM MCP_REQUEST A , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR B WHERE 1=1 AND A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN = #{mobileNo} AND A.ON_OFF_TYPE IN ('0', '3') -- 직영 AND A.CNTPNT_SHOP_ID = '1100011741' -- 직영온라인 AND TO_CHAR(A.REQ_IN_DAY,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-30,'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')
